flow_points: New Zealand started strong in the Powerplay, scoring 44 runs for 2 wickets (RR 7.33).
Sri Lanka's Powerplay yielded only 20 runs for 2 wickets (RR 3.33).
M Theekshana (3 wickets for 30 runs) and PVD Chameera (3 wickets for 38 runs) picked crucial wickets for Sri Lanka.
MJ Santner anchored New Zealand's innings, contributing 28.0% of their runs.
New Zealand's high-scoring finish in Death Overs (RR 15.6) shifted momentum.
Sri Lanka began their chase under extreme pressure (Index 84.0).
MJ Henry sustained defensive pressure for New Zealand, with an impact score of 148.71.
R Ravindra delivered a crucial spell, taking 4 wickets for 27 runs.
MJ Santner provided control, taking 1 wicket for 19 runs.
Sri Lanka struggled with boundary frequency, hitting one every 13.3 balls.
This increased pressure led to Sri Lanka's late-innings collapse.
New Zealand secured a decisive 61-run victory.
